ascendancyPoints.note: Completed with Vanito — left with 1 honor

skills.name: Tempest Flurry
skills.role: Main damage dealer — shock chains to nearby enemies, Power Charge generation

skills.name: Falling Thunder
skills.role: Big nuke — consumes Power Charges for massive lightning damage

skills.name: Storm Wave
skills.role: AoE fissure — sends lightning wave forward, pack opener

skills.name: Arc
skills.role: Chain clear — fast casts, shocks enemies

skills.name: Orb of Storms
skills.role: AoE storm zone — shreds lightning resist, auto-casts

skills.name: Mana Drain
skills.role: Mana sustain — keeps skills running during heavy combat

skills.name: Killing Palm
skills.role: Execution — finishes low HP enemies, leeches life, generates currency

skills.name: Parry
skills.role: Counter-attack — retaliates on block, leeches life, generates currency

weapons.stash_status: Needs 3 more Int — one +Int ring or passive node
weapons.note: Using Mana Drain wand for sustain until Int hits 48

damageLoop.description: Storm Wave opens packs → Arc chains and shocks → Tempest Flurry generates Power Charges → Falling Thunder consumes charges for nuke → Killing Palm finishes stragglers
steps: 1. Storm Wave → AoE fissure opens packs
3. Tempest Flurry → fast attacks, generate Power Charges
4. Falling Thunder → consume charges → massive lightning nuke
5. Killing Palm → finish low HP enemies

immediate.why: Lowers enemy lightning resist — everything hits harder
immediate.when: When you get an Uncut Skill Gem or find it at vendor

immediate.why: Auto-procs lightning on shocked enemies — free passive DPS
immediate.when: When you have enough Spirit to reserve it

immediate.why: Unlock more Invoker nodes — Culling Strike or Behead

midgame.why: Monk专属 — creates a death zone that scales with Tempest Flurry

midgame.upgrade: +Level to Lightning Skill Gems on quarterstaff
midgame.why: Biggest single DPS upgrade for lightning build
midgame.when: When you find/buy a better weapon

midgame.why: Flat lightning damage boost to everything

endgame.why: More charges = bigger Falling Thunder nukes
Falling Thunder can crit — massive damage multiplier

passiveTree.notes: Lightning-based Invoker Monk. Central path through key lightning nodes.

milestones.title: Equip Deadly Galvanic Wand
milestones.why: Level 8 Galvanic Field — massive DPS upgrade over Mana Drain wand

milestones.title: Unlock Tempest Bell
milestones.why: Monk exclusive — creates death zone scaling with Tempest Flurry

milestones.title: Enable Wrath Aura
milestones.why: Flat lightning damage boost to everything

milestones.title: Take Lightning Storm Notable
milestones.why: Patch 0.5.2 buff: reduced self-shock + increased shock magnitude

milestones.title: Power Charge Stacking Gear
milestones.why: More charges = bigger Falling Thunder nukes

milestones.title: Critical Strike Passive Nodes
milestones.why: Falling Thunder can crit — massive damage multiplier

playstyle: Melee Caster — generate charges, spend them on nukes
